overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a futuristic medical morgue facility. The player, holding a pistol with bloodied hands, moves through examination rooms and corridors, examining medical equipment and interacting with a large holographic patient database screen. The environment features sterile industrial aesthetics with orange accent walls and advanced medical technology.

scene_state.functional_zone: small examination room with body storage

events.description: exits small examination room into connecting corridor

agents.ego_description: moving around the small room, examining the body gurney and medical supplies while holding a pistol

entered.detail: metal gurney holding a body covered in white sheet with blood stains
metal tray with medical tools and a bottle of liquid
medical monitor on rolling cart displaying vital statistics

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a small, enclosed examination room with a body gurney at the center. Medical equipment and an instrument tray are visible as the player looks around the sterile space before moving toward the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to main morgue facility

events.description: enters corridor connecting examination room to main facility
enters large main morgue hall with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and entering the main morgue area, passing medical carts and equipment

entered.detail: orange wall panel with white text reading SECTOR MORGUE
large circular surgical lighting rigs hanging from ceiling
tall storage units with orange emergency supplies visible through glass

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the small room into a connecting corridor and then into a larger morgue facility. An orange 'SECTOR MORGUE' sign marks the entrance to the main hall, where overhead surgical lights and medical storage lockers become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: main morgue operating floor with examination tables

events.description: approaches bloodied operating table with remains
turns toward large medical display screen on the wall

agents.ego_description: circling the central operating table and examining the bloodied remains, then moving toward the medical display

entered.detail: stainless steel examination table covered in blood and organic remains
advanced medical terminal with multiple screens showing body scans
large glass partition with yellow hazard stripes separating areas

segments.scene_description: The player explores the main morgue floor, circling a gruesome bloodied operating table at the center. Medical scanning stations and storage lockers line the walls, while overhead surgical lights illuminate the sterile concrete floor scattered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical database terminal with holographic patient records

events.description: begins interacting with large medical database screen
scrolls through multiple patient profiles and anatomical scans

agents.ego_description: standing before the large medical display, browsing through patient records and examining detailed anatomical scans and injury reports

entered.detail: wall-sized interactive screen showing patient database with anatomical body scans
blue floor mat with white GUILD corporation logo
medical diagrams showing human body systems on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player interacts with a large holographic medical database screen displaying patient profiles and detailed anatomical scans. The screen shows various body injuries and medical data as the player browses through records, standing on a GUILD-branded floor mat in the open morgue area.

events.description: turns away from medical terminal and walks toward exit

agents.ego_description: walking away from the medical terminal toward the exit doorway at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: glass door with exit sign leading to next area
warning signs and informational posters on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the medical terminal and walks toward an exit doorway at the end of the corridor. The GUILD floor mat passes beneath as the player approaches the glass exit door, leaving the main morgue area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped, sterile examination room into a sprawling, high-tech morgue facility. It begins within the enclosed space of a small room centered around a body gurney, moving past medical instruments toward the exit. As the camera passes through a connecting corridor, the scene opens into a larger hall marked by an orange Sector Morgue sign, where overhead surgical lights illuminate a concrete floor scattered with debris and a bloodied operating table. The movement then shifts toward a large holographic medical database, lingering on anatomical scans and patient profiles while standing atop a GUILD-branded floor mat. Finally, the camera turns away from the terminal and glides across the mat toward a glass exit door at the end of the corridor, leaving the main facility behind.
